title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As we conclude the workweek and head into the weekend, take a moment to review the key articles from this week, including those you've highlighted. A challenging freight market environment , Big-3's crude exports dip in December, led by Russia , 2025 isn't forecastable. , The Big Picture: Tanker ordering , and more.
